title: Payment Methods
noMethodsText: Set up your first payment method to start gaining rebates. Link your preferred wallet address or bank account to enable seamless, instant withdrawals.
connectAnotherText: Add a new bank account or crypto wallet.
networkWarning: Please make sure the network and wallet address are correct. Transactions sent to the wrong network or address cannot be recovered.
setDefaultWithdrawal: Set as my default withdrawal method
saveError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
